# Vocabulary Index Output Template

Write the vocabulary index to `docs/.vocabulary.md`:

```markdown
---
generated: "<date>"
generator: "consolidate-specs Step 12"
status: auto-generated
---

# Knowledge Vocabulary Index

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by /consolidate-specs -- do not edit manually.
     Regenerated on every run. Custom values are accepted by /learn and triggers.
     This file is a derived artifact, not a source of truth. -->

## Types

| Type | Directory | Count |
|------|-----------|-------|
| decision | docs/decisions/ | N |
| lesson | docs/lessons/ | N |
| convention | docs/conventions/ | N |
| business-rule | docs/business-rules/ | N |

## Domains

| Domain | Count | Sources |
|--------|-------|---------|
| architecture | N | decisions, lessons, conventions |
| ... | ... | ... |

## Base Categories

architecture, interface, data-model, dependencies, error-handling, testing, security, local-dev-deployment
```
